backend.noRules: Backend is reachable but no GDPR rules are configured.
backend.unexpectedConnection: Unexpected error while connecting to backend.

assessment.unexpectedGenerate: Unexpected error while generating the assessment.
assessment.saveBeforeEdit: Generate and save an assessment before editing checklist items.
assessment.unexpectedUpdate: Unexpected error while updating checklist item.
assessment.addEvidenceBeforeSave: Add notes or an evidence URL before saving.
assessment.unexpectedEvidenceSave: Unexpected error while saving evidence metadata.
assessment.unexpectedEvidenceDelete: Unexpected error while deleting evidence metadata.
assessment.notLoaded: No assessment has been loaded yet.

report.exported: Report exported as HTML. Open it in the browser and print to PDF if needed.
